mapper.select: select apply_id, type_id, req_allow_preview, req_allow_download, audit_allow_preview, audit_allow_download, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_read_range_apply_item where apply_id = #{applyId} order by type_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_read_range_apply_item ( apply_id, type_id, req_allow_preview, req_allow_download, audit_allow_preview, audit_allow_download, create_by, remark, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{applyId}, #{typeId}, #{reqAllowPreview}, #{reqAllowDownload}, #{auditAllowPreview}, #{auditAllowDownload}, #{createBy}'', #{remark}NULL, sysdate(), sysdate() )
